title: Saidot App
description: Saidot is a governance tool for safe, ethical and transparent AI.
jobDescription: As a Fullstack Developer, I contributed to a dynamic monorepo project, handling both frontend and backend development aspects. My responsibilities included crafting intuitive user interfaces, designing robust APIs using NestJS GraphQL with a 'code-first' approach, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to achieve project goals. I maintained a keen focus on code quality and problem-solving, ensuring seamless functionality and enhancing the overall user experience.
productSolves: Companies deploying AI had no structured way to document decisions, audit model behavior, or prove ethical compliance to regulators.
roleShort: Fullstack Developer in a cross-functional monorepo team
scale: Enterprise SaaS product used by companies managing AI governance across multiple regulatory frameworks
outcome: Designed and shipped GraphQL APIs (NestJS code-first) and React UI features end-to-end, reducing time-to-feature across the team

title: QR Product Explorer App
description: The application to simplify product identification.
jobDescription: I took the lead in crafting a Progressive Web Application (PWA) designed to complement a dashboard system. My primary objective was to develop a user-friendly solution capable of seamlessly scanning QR codes and presenting corresponding product information. The app operates entirely within a local network setup.
productSolves: A manufacturer needed a fast way for production line workers to identify and retrieve product information directly on the factory floor.
roleShort: Sole developer — built the PWA as a companion to the dashboard system
scale: Internal tool running on a local production network
outcome: Delivered a mobile PWA with QR scanning accessible on any phone, no installation needed

title: Logging Integration
description: The project encompassed the development of a Production Dashboard, the integration of data from the PLC into a MySQL database, and the implementation of safety measures to guarantee the integrity of production statistics. This system not only improved production monitoring but also ensured that the manufacturer had a dependable source of data for assessing and enhancing production processes.
jobDescription: My role in this project encompassed designing and developing the Production Dashboard, creating Python fetchers for data integration from the PLC, and implementing Docker containers for deployment and system management. Additionally, I played a crucial role in creating comprehensive documentation to ensure clarity, transparency, and knowledge transfer throughout the project.
productSolves: A manufacturer had no visibility into real-time production line performance — no way to monitor output, detect issues, or assess productivity from PLC data.
roleShort: Sole developer — built the dashboard, Python PLC data fetchers, and deployment setup
scale: Production system integrating live PLC data into a dashboard used by both floor employees and management
outcome: Gave the team real-time production monitoring and alerting, replacing manual checks with automated data pipelines from PLC to MySQL

title: vavro.me
description: My personal web presentation.
productSolves: A personal portfolio to showcase professional experience, projects, and skills to potential employers and clients.
roleShort: Solo — designed and built everything
scale: Personal site, currently live
outcome: Continuously iterated over multiple versions — current build uses Nuxt 3 + GSAP with a fully custom design

title: Acrolinx
description: Acrolinx is a Content Governance Solution, a software platform designed to create amazing content.
jobDescription: In my role as a Senior Frontend Engineer, I played a key part in the development of a web application for administration. On a daily basis, I focused on implementing features using React functional components written in Typescript. Additionally, I was responsible for conducting frontend testing using Jest and React Testing Library.
productSolves: Large enterprises struggled to maintain consistent brand language and content quality across thousands of documents and authors.
roleShort: Senior Frontend Engineer — feature development on the admin web app
scale: Enterprise platform used by Fortune 500 companies to govern content at scale
outcome: Implemented features in React/TypeScript and built a frontend test suite with Jest and React Testing Library

title: terminal.com.co
description: The online platform provides the most current information regarding bus routes and schedules. It is a comprehensive portal that allows you to access the latest data directly from the transportation companies. With our reliable and user-friendly platform, you can say goodbye to outdated information and enjoy a hassle-free commute.
jobDescription: As the software engeneer for this project, I spearheaded both frontend and backend development, creating the web application from the ground up. I also played a significant role in task management and story creation, ensuring the project progressed smoothly. Additionally, I took on various managerial responsibilities, facilitating team communication and resolving challenges as they arose. My comprehensive contributions were instrumental in bringing our web application to life.
productSolves: Travelers in Colombia had no reliable online source for up-to-date bus routes and schedules — information was scattered or outdated.
roleShort: Sole engineer — built frontend and backend from scratch, also handled task management
scale: Startup idea — full web app built and launched but ultimately didn't gain traction
outcome: Took the product from zero to production solo, covering full-stack development, team coordination, and shipping the full web app

title: CareConnect365
description: CareConnect365 was a US-based start-up idea with a focus on technology designed specifically for seniors to help them stay independent, healthy, and connected to family and friends.
jobDescription:
I was responsible for overseeing the entire development process. Our goal was to use React Native to reproduce an existing native app that facilitates contact between older relatives and their families. The goal was to make the UI easier to use and more accessible. In the project, I also took charge of the backend development of missing API functionalities using the Node.js web framework, Hapi.js, and MongoDB.

In my role as team lead, I assisted in setting up a fantastic team that put a product into production earlier than expected with complete customer satisfaction. My approach is always to be completely accessible so that I can assist with issues and share my knowledge and understanding with others, but I think this success was brought about by regular interaction with the customer, a mix of best practices we used, efficient cooperation, and open communication to identify the best solutions.
productSolves: Elderly people struggled to stay connected with family and access care services — existing apps were too complex for seniors to use independently.
roleShort: Tech Lead — led the team, managed client communication and reporting
scale: US-based startup — React Native app shipped to production ahead of schedule
outcome: Built and led the team from scratch, delivered ahead of schedule with full customer satisfaction, handling both missing backend APIs and frontend accessibility improvements

title: Infocyte
description: Infocyte is a cybersecurity company providing the leading platform for Incident Response and delivering cost-effective MDR services.
jobDescription: During my time at Infocyte, I was responsible for improving the administrative dashboard, with a special focus on performance and usability. My tasks included implementing new features, streamlining the frontend by replacing Redux with MobX, and utilizing React performance optimization hooks. These changes resulted in a more efficient and user-friendly experience. On the backend, I created and maintained endpoints, connecting them to PostgreSQL and third-party APIs, gaining valuable experience with the LoopBack framework.
productSolves: Security teams lacked a cost-effective way to detect, investigate, and respond to cyber threats across their infrastructure.
roleShort: Fullstack Developer — joined to improve the admin dashboard performance and usability
scale: Cybersecurity SaaS platform offering incident response and managed detection services
outcome: Replaced Redux with MobX, applied React performance optimisation hooks, and built/maintained backend endpoints connected to PostgreSQL and third-party APIs — resulting in a noticeably faster and cleaner UI

title: CropSwap
description: CropSwap is a marketplace type app that connects a global consumer-base with produce local to them.
jobDescription: As tech lead I was responsible for managing the technical aspects of a project, leading a team of engineers, ensuring high-quality technical solutions, and mentoring team members.
productSolves: Local produce buyers had no easy way to discover and purchase fresh food directly from nearby growers, bypassing supermarket supply chains.
roleShort: Tech Lead — managed the engineering team and ensured technical quality
scale: Marketplace mobile app targeting a global consumer base
outcome: Led the engineering team, mentored developers, and drove technical decisions to keep the product moving toward production

title: DUENIO
description: A start-up, the application is specifically created for landlords to verify the background of potential tenants.
jobDescription: Leading the charge as the principal developer, I played a pivotal role in spearheading the development of comprehensive mobile applications using React Native. From conceptualization to deployment, I leveraged my expertise in React Native to ensure seamless and efficient development of high-quality mobile applications that exceeded the expectations of end-users.
productSolves: Landlords in Colombia had no reliable way to verify a potential tenant's background before signing a lease, leading to costly disputes.
roleShort: Principal developer — built the mobile app from concept to deployment
scale: Startup app covered by national press (El País Colombia)
outcome: Delivered a full React Native mobile app for both iOS and Android, from concept through to production release

title: vavro.me (V1)
description: The website about my professional experience.
productSolves: A personal portfolio to present professional experience — an earlier version built with a classic JS stack before modern frameworks.
roleShort: Solo — designed and built everything
scale: Personal site, superseded by the current version
outcome: Shipped a fully custom portfolio using Webpack, Babel, and EJS — later rebuilt as the current Nuxt 3 version

title: CALALI
description: A unique chat application.
jobDescription: CALALI is built on the Ionic platform that uses the Angular.js framework to build cross-platform mobile applications. On the backend, it uses a Sails/Node.js app with MongoDB to handle user accounts, chat operations and authentication.
productSolves: People learning languages had no easy way to practice vocabulary in a conversational, chat-based format on mobile.
roleShort: Solo developer — built frontend and backend end-to-end
scale: Personal side project — cross-platform mobile app
outcome: Shipped a full chat application with user accounts and authentication using Ionic, Angular, Sails/Node.js, and MongoDB

title: hopin.sk
description: The most popular transport mobile app in Slovakia since 2012. Order a taxi, limo or find your right public transport line.
jobDescription: My responsibilities as a PHP developer included full-stack development, utilizing a variety of technologies to create a dynamic website.
productSolves: There was no reliable mobile app for booking taxis in Slovakia.
roleShort: PHP developer — full-stack website development
scale: Most popular transport app in Slovakia since 2012
outcome: Built and maintained the web presence for a market-leading transport platform serving thousands of daily commuters

title: DISPATCHER application
description: ding.ai, an advanced application for package management designed for parcel companies.
productSolves: Parcel companies had no modern tool to manage and track package dispatching efficiently.
roleShort: Frontend developer — built the dispatcher UI
scale: Internal tool for parcel companies
outcome: Delivered a dispatching interface in AngularJS covering the full package management workflow

title: justmassage.sk
description: A company offering massage service.
productSolves: A local massage business had no online presence to attract clients and showcase their services.
roleShort: Solo developer — built and delivered the full site
scale: Small business website for a Slovak massage company
outcome: Delivered a WordPress-based site with a custom theme, giving the business a professional online presence

title: ding.ai
description: A startup company offering parcel tracking products.
productSolves: Parcel companies lacked a modern, unified platform for tracking and managing shipments end-to-end.
roleShort: Frontend developer — built the marketing/product website
scale: Startup offering parcel tracking products
outcome: Delivered the company's web presence in AngularJS as part of the broader ding.ai product suite

title: filesplit.org
description: An online tool to split text files.
productSolves: There was no simple, no-install way to split large text files into smaller chunks online.
roleShort: Solo developer — built and maintained the full tool
scale: Free public web tool used globally
outcome: Shipped and maintained a live utility that remains accessible today for splitting text files in the browser

title: Extensions for Joomla!
description: I am a creator of variety of custom extensions for Joomla!, many of them registered and published at Joomla! Extensions Directory.
productSolves: Joomla site owners needed specific functionality that wasn't covered by existing extensions in the ecosystem.
roleShort: Solo developer — full development lifecycle from build to publishing
scale: Multiple extensions published in the official Joomla! Extensions Directory
outcome: Built and released a variety of custom Joomla extensions used by the community worldwide

title: JOOMLA.vavro.me
description: My e-commerce space to offer my extensions for Joomla CMS for sale.
jobDescription: I offer my services and expertise in Joomla CMS. On this website, you can find Joomla extensions developed by me.
productSolves: I needed my own storefront to sell and distribute the Joomla extensions I built, on my own terms.
roleShort: Solo — built and ran the e-commerce site
scale: Personal e-commerce site selling custom Joomla extensions
outcome: Built a self-hosted shop with a custom PayPal checkout integration — later extracted and published as a standalone Joomla extension

title: YOVOCA
description: An online learning system designed for the purpose of English vocabulary enrichment, using subtitles of movies.
productSolves: Language learners had no engaging way to build vocabulary using real-world content like movie subtitles.
roleShort: Solo developer — built the full app end-to-end
scale: Personal side project — open source on GitHub
outcome: Shipped a working vocabulary learning system that uses movie subtitles as study material

title: daysalive.com
description: Application to find out how many days have passed since a certain date, e.g. date of birth.
productSolves: There was no quick, simple tool to calculate exactly how many days you've been alive from a given date.
roleShort: Solo developer — built and launched the tool
scale: Free public web tool
outcome: Shipped a lightweight date calculator that remains simple and focused on one thing

title: Galeria Remix
description: A photo sharing platform.
productSolves: There was no dedicated platform for a specific community to share and discover photos in one place.
roleShort: Solo developer — built the full site

title: epsa.com.co
description: EPSA was a Colombian energy provider, now is part of the Celsia group.
productSolves: A major Colombian energy provider needed their website modernised and properly maintained.
roleShort: Web developer — maintenance and template redesign
scale: Corporate website for one of Colombia's largest energy companies
outcome: Redesigned the site template and kept the platform up-to-date for an enterprise-scale client

title: Inmovis
description: Inmovis was a web application developed for real estate agents, which helps to promote and socialize properties between agents to increase sales and happy customers.
productSolves: Real estate agents had no shared platform to promote and exchange property listings between each other to increase sales.
roleShort: Lead developer — main engineer on the team, covered full application development lifecycle
scale: Web platform for the Colombian real estate agent market
outcome: Built the full application from scratch, enabling agents to list, share, and socialise properties on a single platform

title: icl.com.co
description: A company in the metalworking sector founded in 1988.
jobDescription: As the lead web developer, I oversaw every aspect of the website's lifecycle, from initial planning to ongoing maintenance. To create an exceptional online shopping experience for customers, I integrated Joomla and VirtueMart into the website, seamlessly merging an online store with the rest of the site's functionality. In addition to my expertise in these technologies, I leveraged my proficiency in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to create a dynamic, user-friendly website. By integrating these tools, customers were able to easily browse products, add items to their shopping cart, and complete their purchases without leaving the site. Finally, I provided the client with full control over updating and managing the website's content, ensuring that it remained current and relevant to their evolving needs.
productSolves: A Colombian metalworking company needed an online presence with an integrated shop to sell their products directly to customers.
roleShort: Lead web developer — oversaw the full site lifecycle and e-commerce integration
scale: Corporate site with online store for a manufacturer founded in 1988
outcome: Integrated Joomla with VirtueMart to deliver a seamless shopping experience, and handed full content control to the client
